recommendations.overview: A scientist in a surrealist society kidnaps children to steal their dreams, hoping that they slow his aging process.

recommendations.title: Bigbug
recommendations.overview: Set in the world of 2045, where communities have robotic helpers, a group of suburbanites are locked in for their protection by their household robots, while a rogue, self-aware AI android revolt uprising takes place outside.

recommendations.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
recommendations.overview: In a world where walking, talking, digitally connected bots have become children's best friends, an 11-year-old finds that his robot buddy doesn't quite work the same as the others do.

recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.
